normies
museum

step inside a first-person gallery where every normie is sculpted as a tactile voxel relief — dark pixels physically extruded from the canvas.

multiple wallets · comma-separated

voxel sculpture each piece extruded into 3D relief
multi-room gallery rooms scale with your collection
ambient audio debussy, footsteps, spatial sound
opensea ↗
built by @aster0x

about

normuseum

normuseum is a first-person 3D voxel gallery for the Normies NFT collection on ethereum mainnet. paste any wallet address or ENS name — multiple wallets supported, comma-separated — and walk through your collection on the walls of a minimal white-cube gallery.

each normie is rendered as a high-quality voxel relief, with dark pixels physically extruded from the canvas to create a tactile, sculptural effect. rooms are generated dynamically to host collections of any size, connected by corridors with marble finishes, moulding and skylight detail.

normiesarchive.xyz ↗ pixel history explorer — also by aster0x @aster0x on X ↗ creator & developer normies.art ↗ official collection

a 3D gallery experience · ethereum mainnet
